name: ast-grep
tagline: Wraps the ast-grep (sg) CLI for AST-aware code search and codemods across 25 languages, with dry-run-first rewrite safety.
verdict: Solid: SKILL.md text shows no exfiltration, no destructive-without-confirmation ops, and explicit dry-run/two-pass invariants before any file mutation. Minor gaps: install.sh/install.ps1 and the helper script weren't fetched for this review so their contents are unverified (normal supply-chain caution applies), and there's no version/changelog field to signa

highlights.summary: Skill delegates binary install to bundled install.sh/install.ps1 and a Python helper script, none of which were fetched for this review — a user installing this skill is trusting unverified install sc
Frontmatter has no version or changelog field, so a user re-reading this skill later has no signal of what changed since a prior install.
